title: Anyone familiar with using the case management template for legal matters?
excerpt: We are a small law office, exploring Monday.com as a replacement for some practice management software that provides pretty straightforward integration among calendars, case information, contacts and clients, and related…

posts.author: Kurt (Kurt Harper)
posts.cookedHtml: We are a small law office, exploring Monday.com as a replacement for some practice management software that provides pretty straightforward integration among calendars, case information, contacts and clients, and related documents. I see there is a Legal Case Management template for Monday.com, but I am not sure it covers how we have historically managed our litigation matters. Does anyone out there have any real-world experience using this template?
